title: Sweet Potato Crumble
description: A delicious dessert made with sweet potatoes, topped with a crumbly mixture.
instructions: Poke some holes in the sweet potatoes with a fork and bake for 45-60 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, mix together the grilled almonds, korean crumble, brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, let them cool for a few minutes.
Slice the sweet potatoes in half lengthwise and top each half with the crumbly mixture.
Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
